name: Corporate Cash Credit
description_short: Corporate Cash Credit helps small business owners secure unsecured corporate credit cards and business funding by building their Paydex score and matching them with appropriate lenders.
description_long:
Corporate Cash Credit is a business funding facilitation service that positions itself as a intermediary between small business owners and commercial lenders. Founded to address the challenge of business credit accessibility, the company operates through a systematic approach that begins with making businesses "credit-ready" before pursuing funding applications.

The company's primary offerings include: (1) Paydex score building (targeting an 80 score in 45 days), (2) unsecured corporate credit card approvals with cash access at purchase APR, (3) trade credit line development, and (4) full-service credit application completion. They also offer optional setup services including DUNS registration, business licensing assistance, phone/fax systems, website design, and corporate documentation. Clients receive 6 months of dedicated credit coaching as part of their funding package.

Corporate Cash Credit differentiates itself through a claimed full-service model where they complete all credit applications on behalf of clients, reference an internal lender database, and apply geographic-based lender research. Their timeline-based approach sequences activities across a 7-day credit-ready period, pre-Paydex funding, Paydex achievement, trade credit building, and post-Paydex funding rounds. The website showcases client testimonials claiming funding amounts ranging from $25,000 to $200,000+, with some achieved within 3-7 weeks.

However, several limitations warrant consideration: The company makes no guarantees about funding amounts or approval odds. Their Paydex timeline carries explicit disclaimers that the 45-day promise can extend beyond 60 days depending on client responsiveness and vendor reporting cycles. The optional services pricing ($99-$3,950) creates additional costs beyond their core service. Success stories are self-reported testimonials without independent verification. No information is provided about pricing for core services, lender approval rates, or typical APRs on obtained credit products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Full-service application completion: Company fills out all credit applications on client's behalf, reducing administrative burden
Paydex-focused strategy: Systematic 45-day process to build Dun & Bradstreet Paydex score, which directly impacts business lending eligibility
Multi-round funding approach: Sequences funding opportunities (pre-Paydex, post-Paydex, second round) to maximize total available credit
Geographic lender matching: Uses location-based research and internal lender database to identify appropriate funding sources
Bundled credit coaching: Six months of dedicated credit and funding coach access included with funding package
Transparent timeline: Website clearly maps out each phase of the funding process with estimated durations
Comprehensive optional services: One-stop shop for business setup needs (DUNS, licensing, banking, website, corporate kit)
cons: No pricing transparency: Core service costs are not disclosed on website; only optional add-on pricing is shown
Paydex timeline is not guaranteed: Company explicitly disclaims the 45-day promise, stating it can exceed 60 days based on client responsiveness and vendor reporting
Unverified claims: Client testimonials lack third-party verification or independent confirmation of funding amounts and timelines
Optional services add cost: Beyond core service, clients may incur $99-$3,950+ in additional fees for business setup assistance
No disclosed approval rates or APR information: Website does not specify approval odds, typical interest rates, or credit card terms achieved
best_for: Small business owners (2-10 years established) needing to build business credit from scratch or repair damaged Paydex scores
Entrepreneurs with weak personal credit who need unsecured funding without personal guarantees
Business owners seeking cash advances or lines of credit but lacking traditional collateral or strong credit history
Startups or newly formed entities needing help establishing business legitimacy (DUNS, licensing, banking infrastructure)
diagnosis: Corporate Cash Credit is best suited for established small business owners (2+ years) or entrepreneurs with moderate business history who need to build business credit and secure unsecured funding but lack the knowledge or credit profile to do so independently. Primary caveat: Core service pricing is completely absent from their website, making true cost comparison impossible, and their Paydex timeline guarantees come with substantial disclaimers that undermine the headline 45-day promise.
services: Paydex score building and optimization (targeting 80+ score)
Unsecured corporate credit card applications and approvals
Full-service credit application completion and submission
Lender matching and research based on business profile and geography
DUNS number registration and Dun & Bradstreet profile setup
Business licensing and occupational license applications
Corporate phone/fax system setup with auto attendant
Website design, domain registration, and email system setup
Trade name and foreign entity registration applications
Corporate kit and business seal procurement
Six months of dedicated credit and funding coaching
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1000 Ponce de Leon Blvd STE 103, Coral Gables, FL 33134
